nasb.text: Then Nathan said, “My lord the king, have you said, ‘Adonijah shall be king after me, and he shall sit on my throne’?

esv.text: And Nathan said, “My lord the king, have you said, ‘Adonijah shall reign after me, and he shall sit on my throne’?

cnv.text: 拿單說：“我主我王啊，你曾說過：‘亞多尼雅要接續我作王，坐在我的王位上’嗎？

ccb.text: 说：“我主我王啊，你已经宣布让亚多尼雅继承你的王位，坐你的宝座吗？
